intro: 💬 YouTube Comments Scraper is a ready-to-run Apify actor from FlowExtract API for social media. Extract comments from any YouTube video with author information, likes, timestamps, and nested replies - fast, reliable, and built for scale. This page explains what it does, who it's for, and how to get the most out of it — then includes the full technical documentation below.
useCases: top-level Comments with full text content
author Information including name, channel ID, avatar, and verification status
engagement Metrics - like counts and reply counts

faq.q: How do I run 💬 YouTube Comments Scraper?
faq.a: Open 💬 YouTube Comments Scraper on the Apify Store, provide your input (URLs or search parameters), and click Start. Results are available as JSON, CSV, or Excel, and via the Apify API.
💬 YouTube Comments Scraper runs on Apify's pay-as-you-go platform; you only pay for the compute/usage a run consumes. Check the actor page for current pricing and any free tier.
